prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 108.8 kg; Height 181.6 cm; BMI 33.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 9.6%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.6%), FPG (12 months ago 245mg/dL; 9 months ago 223mg/dL; 6 months ago 228mg/dL; 3 months ago 229mg/dL; current 281mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 107.9kg; 9 months ago 109.1kg; 6 months ago 105.3kg; 3 months ago 105.2kg; current 108.8kg), Height (12 months ago 181.6cm; 9 months ago 181.6cm; 6 months ago 181.6cm; 3 months ago 181.6cm; current 181.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 33.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 140mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 74U/L; 9 months ago 73U/L; 6 months ago 65U/L; 3 months ago 67U/L; current 70U/L), AST (12 months ago 46U/L; 9 months ago 55U/L; 6 months ago 48U/L; 3 months ago 49U/L; current 51U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 188mg/g; 9 months ago 146mg/g; 6 months ago 209mg/g; 3 months ago 170mg/g; current 208mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 89mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 103mg/dL; 9 months ago 122mg/dL; 6 months ago 121mg/dL; 3 months ago 122mg/dL; current 114mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.3g/dL; 9 months ago 12.7g/dL; 6 months ago 12.8g/dL; 3 months ago 13.3g/dL; current 13.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
